entry.title: New: CC 25-4 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
COUNCIL CHAIR LEE, transmitting an amendment to Resolution 25-85, entitled "AMENDING RESOLUTION 22-193, CD1, FD1, TO ALLOW THE DIRECTOR OF HOUSING TO EXTEND TIME DEADLINES FOR COMMENCEMENT OF CONSTRUCTION AND COMPLETION OF KUIKAHI VILLAGE WORKFORCE HOUSING PROJECT"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
